summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PAPERWORK pillar. All backend APIs working correctly (19/19 tests passed). Frontend Paperwork page loads with deep blue theme, displays 5 Featured Bundles, 12+ Individual Products. Navbar dropdown shows all 6 document categories. Admin PaperworkManager loads with 4 tabs (Requests, Products, Bundles, Settings) and shows correct stats (14 products, 5 bundles).
seed_data_creation: Data was seeded by main agent - 14 products, 5 bundles
context_for_next_testing_agent: Paperwork pillar fully functional. Backend APIs: /api/paperwork/products (14 products), /api/paperwork/bundles (5 bundles), /api/paperwork/categories (6 categories with subcategories), /api/paperwork/admin/stats, /api/paperwork/admin/settings, /api/paperwork/config, /api/paperwork/requests. Frontend: PaperworkPage.jsx with deep blue theme, PaperworkManager.jsx with 4 tabs in admin panel. Navbar has Paperwork dropdown with 6 document categories.

api_verification./api/paperwork/bundles: 200 OK - 5 bundles (Paw Papers Starter, Travel Ready, Emergency & Lost Pet, Lifetime Health File, Digital Document Suite)
